name: "Buddy — Local host"

---

### Safety first
- [ ] I will meet in a **public place** (café, park, station).
- [ ] I understand no payment/ID/personal docs are ever shared.
- [ ] I've read the [safety guidance](https://github.com/embeddedJedi/discovereu-companion#buddy-safety).

### You
**GitHub handle:** @your-handle-here
**City:** (e.g. Berlin)
**What you can offer:** (2-3 lines — coffee, walking tour, specific knowledge)
**Languages you speak:** (e.g. EN, DE, TR)

### When are you around?
(Rough dates / days of week)

### Anything else?
(Optional)
